title: Prawn and Dumpling Currywurst
description: A German-inspired twist on traditional Currywurst, featuring prawns and dumplings.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. Season the prawns with salt, black pepper, and curry powder.
3. Grill the prawns for 2-3 minutes per side, or until pink and cooked through.
4. Meanwhile, grill the dumplings for 2-3 minutes per side, or until lightly toasted.
5. Warm the BBQ sauce in a saucepan over low heat.
6. Brush the BBQ sauce onto the grilled dumplings.
7. Assemble the Currywurst by placing a grilled dumpling on each slice of German Rye Bread.
8. Top with grilled prawns, sliced onions, and chopped parsley (if using).
10. Optional: Serve with additional BBQ sauce for dipping.
